---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement unrelated to a specific tool
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

**Describe the feature**

Provide a clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see implemented.

**Motivation**

Why is this feature important? What problem does it solve or what value does it add?

**Proposed implementation**

If you have ideas on how this feature could be implemented, describe them here. If not, leave blank.

**Additional context**

Include any other context or screenshots that may help us understand the request.
